title: colymbada spinulosa
intro: Colymbada spinulosa, also known as the Spiny Cabbage or Rock Cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins. Herbal preparations of Colymbada spinulosa include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
